properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The time has come Divine Revelation in God's word It's grace I see, when I see how He has chosen me And it happens everyday when I begin to pray It burns within my heart, The things he always says He revealeth unto me, What I was born to be In this day.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I'm staying, on my knees Patiently waiting, on my knees For Your outpouring, on my knees Oh Lord we need You, on my knees

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe, I was born predestinated seed Amazing grace, Has chosen me to run this race. And I will give my life to Him, Perfected without sin I can't do this on my own, Lord put flesh on these dry bones If it takes this life to give, then for You I will live I need You Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And when You come, You will meet me, on my knees I'm in anticipation, on my knees I'm waiting for You, Jesus, on my knees I am an empty vessel, on my knees

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've read the Scriptures in the Bible About the mighty gentile warriors The painful desires of Hanna, And the fearless move of Ezra Lord I believe that they were true And the token they received But what about me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I know my battles are all won, That's why I sing my song I know blessings are all mine, But it will just take time So like Elijah here I stay, with faith in such a way To know you'd come.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And when You come You'll meet me, on my knees In consecration, on my knees I'm on the threshing floor, on my knees Oh Lord, I need You, on my knees I'm waiting patiently, on my knees I need You, Holy Spirit, on my knees When You come You will meet me, on my knees Lord, I'm not moving, on my knees Lord, right here I am staying, on my knees Lord, it's important to me, on my knees When You come you will meet me, on my knees I want the Holy Spirit, on my knees
